Guangzhou travel journal

Trip sections
Arrival & Old GuangzhouXiguan & YongqingfangYuexiu & ChimelongBaiyun MountainScience Centre & Canton Tower
10 May 2026 – 15 May 2026

Guangzhou

Six days across the old city, Chimelong, Baiyun Mountain, and Canton Tower.

Sunday, 10 May

Day 1 - Arrival & Old Guangzhou

Route   Changi Airport → Guangzhou Baiyun Airport → Puji Hotel → Qiaomeishijia → Shamian Island → Pearl River → Onelink International Mall → Sacred Heart Cathedral → Tianzi Wharf → Haizhu Square

After the early flight from Singapore, we left our bags at Beijing Road and started with roasted pigeon and pork. The afternoon moved from Shamian Island's colonial streets to the cathedral, followed by the 6:40 pm Pearl River night cruise.

Sacred Heart Cathedral

Guangzhou Sacred Heart Cathedral · 广州圣心大教堂

Shamian Island

A quiet pause among Shamian's tree-lined streets

Monday, 11 May

Day 2 - Xiguan & Yongqingfang

Route   Shangxiajiu Pedestrian Street → Dongji Xintiandi → Lianxianglou → Yongqingfang → Cantonese Opera Museum → Comic City → Dagefan → Beijing Road → Dafo Temple

We spent the day around Xiguan, moving between traditional Cantonese food, restored lane houses, the Cantonese Opera Museum, and Yongqingfang's small design details. After dinner, Beijing Road and the illuminated Dafo Temple closed out the night.

Yongqingfang

Wing Chun heritage inside the restored Xiguan lanes

Yongqingfang

New colour woven into old grey-brick architecture

Yongqingfang

A sculpted streetscape detail

Tuesday, 12 May

Day 3 - Yuexiu & Chimelong

Route   Yuexiu Park → Five Rams Sculpture → Chimelong Safari Park → Chimelong International Circus

The morning began in Yuexiu Park before a full afternoon at Chimelong Safari Park. Cable-car views, close wildlife encounters, and the evening circus made this the most animated day of the trip.

Yuexiu Park

Zhenhai Tower in Guangzhou's largest central park

Chimelong Safari Park

The Africa section of the safari route

Chimelong Safari Park

Toucan along the walking route

Chimelong Safari Park

White tiger enclosure

Chimelong Safari Park

Tigers along the shaded trail

Chimelong Safari Park

Koala habitat

Chimelong Safari Park

Giant panda habitat

Chimelong Safari Park

Panda feeding time

Chimelong International Circus

The evening performance

Chimelong International Circus

Motorcycle globe act

Wednesday, 13 May

Day 4 - Baiyun Mountain

Route   Baiyun Mountain → Moxing Summit → ECHIC Hotel, Tianhe → Wanguo Outlet → Grandview Mall

We took the cable car up Baiyun Mountain and continued on foot to Moxing Summit, the mountain's 382-metre high point. After checking into Tianhe, the rest of the day stayed around the area's outlets and malls.

Baiyun Mountain

A shaded rest point on the climb

Moxing Summit

Guangzhou from 382 metres

Thursday, 14 May

Day 5 - Science Centre & Canton Tower

Route   Guangdong Science Centre → Dongshankou → Canton Tower → Bubble Tram → Tianhe

Hands-on exhibits filled the morning at Guangdong Science Centre. We then wandered through Dongshankou's East-meets-West streets before heading up Canton Tower for the 6 pm Bubble Tram and sunset over the Pearl River.

Guangdong Science Centre

The science centre's sweeping entrance

Guangdong Science Centre

Driving simulator exhibit

Dongshankou

Historic architecture among the neighbourhood's cafes and galleries

Canton Tower

Above Guangzhou before sunset

Canton Tower

Tianhe and the Pearl River from above

Canton Tower Bubble Tram

Sunset over the Pearl River

Canton Tower

A final look back at the tower

Friday, 15 May

Day 6 - Departure

Route   ECHIC Hotel → Guangzhou Baiyun Airport Terminal 3 → Changi Airport

Up early for the airport and the 10:40 am flight home. We were back in Singapore by mid-afternoon.

← Previous: Japan
